problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: If Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
